description: This class includes the growing of other perennial crops, such as natural rubber trees and Christmas trees grown on plantations.
includes: growing of Christmas trees grown on plantations
growing of trees for extraction of sap
growing of vegetable materials of a kind used primarily for plaiting, stuffing, padding, dyeing or tanning
excludes: growing of rough-cut Christmas trees on forest land, see 0220
natural extraction of sap, gums or rubber, see 0230
